appStoreConnect.subtitle: Get More Google Reviews Fast
appStoreConnect.promotionalText: Send SMS review requests after every job. Monitor Google and Yelp reviews in real time. Reply with AI drafts. $14.99/month, no contract.
appStoreConnect.whatsNew: First release of ReviewPulse! Send SMS review requests, monitor Google and Yelp reviews in real time, reply with AI-drafted responses, track analytics, and manage customer contacts. Free tier included.

inAppPurchases.description: Unlimited SMS requests, AI reply drafts, Yelp monitoring, full analytics dashboard, push notifications

appStoreConnect.reviewNotes: This app is a B2B review management tool for solo business owners. SMS review requests are sent by business owners to their own customers (not marketing/spam). The Google Business Profile OAuth flow connects the user's own business profile. AI reply drafts use Claude Haiku via server-side Supabase Edge Functions. Free tier: 5 SMS/month, 1 connected profile. Pro tier: unlimited SMS, AI replies, multi-platform monitoring.
